seoTitle: Friday Pocket vs Fulham — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Friday Pocket vs Fulham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Friday Pocket and Fulham.
heading: Friday Pocket vs Fulham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Friday Pocket, Queensland and Fulham, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Friday Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Fulham (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Friday Pocket or Fulham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Friday Pocket has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Fulham scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Friday Pocket scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Fulham scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Friday Pocket or Fulham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Friday Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
